title: Bloodline trials
description: a datapack that add two race's, every race upgradable by killing other player, that datapack is a server datapack with that i mean a server for 5+ player's for Better experience
body:
# For players
**There are 2 race's**
- blood
- forstlyne

**For forstlyne race** :

at cold boimes your race effects will multiply 

Every race have 5 levels 
- level 1 = 0 kill (the lvl have curse)
- level 2 = 5 kills
- level 3 = 10 kills
- level 4 = 15 kills
- level 5 = 20 kills

If you want to change your race use the Roller
![Roller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91324972f08ac0ac592273f1ccdedbd4c4620c0.png)

If you want to get some points without killing people use this recipe
![Point](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4900dc05a7a09a9389d9bd96f5d088afa4a15e3.png)

You can kill a player in your same clan unless the op change it

**Features**
- players head drop when they die by other player
# **For op**
If you want to join a specific clan use 

- /function teams:join_blood
- /function teams:join_forstlyne

If you want to hide the actionbar use 
- /function teams:actionbar_disable
If you want to enable it use
- /function teams:actionbar_enable

if you disable/enable the actionbar it will disable/enable for all players

if you want to upgrade you race use 
- /scoreboard player set @s bloodkills/forstlynekills 5/10/15/20

if you want to toggle the pvp for the races (like two player are blood can hit each other) use 
- /function teams:enable_pvp
- /function teams:disable_pvp

if you want to change the color name of the race's or add or remove prefix use
- /function teams:enable_namecolor
- /function teams:disable_namecolor
- /function teams:enable_prefix
- /function teams:disable_prefix

if you want to disable the head drop when you kill someone use 
- /function teams:disable_player_head
- /function teams:enable_player_head

if anything broke and cant find soulotion use
- /function teams:remove_all then /reload **( this step will reset all progress for all players )**
